caption: A dark green all-terrain vehicle (ATV) is parked indoors on a light-colored tiled floor. The camera is positioned at the rear of the vehicle, focusing on the luggage rack and rear lights. To the left of the ATV, a person is partially visible, wearing light-colored pants and a dark top. The person's arm and side are seen as they stand beside the vehicle. The ATV features a prominent green body with a black rear bumper containing four circular ventilation holes. A small rectangular light is visible on the left side of the rear. Above the rack, a headlight is mounted on the steering column. Throughout the sequence of frames, the camera remains stationary and there is no movement from the person or the vehicle, resulting in a static shot of the scene. No text or logos are legible in the frames.
